The Studio

Photography, treated
as a craft — not a checklist.

BS Photography is a Roorkee-based studio dedicated to unhurried, day-to-day photography — from intimate portraits to full wedding celebrations. Every frame is composed with intention, lit with care, and finished by hand.

Working across Uttarakhand and beyond, we bring a fine-art sensibility to real, lived moments — so what you receive isn't just a photograph, but a keepsake.

10+Years Behind the Lens
500+Stories Captured
100%Hand-Edited Delivery

A full studio,
for every occasion.

01

Wedding Photography

Full-day coverage of your ceremony and celebrations, told as one continuous, cinematic story.

Pre-Wedding Shoots

Event Coverage

05

Family & Everyday

Editorial & Commercial

How It Works

From first call
to final frame.

01

Consultation

We start with a conversation — your story, your date, your vision — over call or in person at the studio.

02

Planning

Locations, timelines and shot lists are mapped out, so the day runs smoothly and nothing is missed.

03

The Shoot

On the day, we work quietly and attentively — guiding when needed, invisible when it matters most.

04

Delivery

Every image is hand-edited and curated into a final gallery, delivered beautifully and on time.
